title: Gravestones Fix
description: Fixes Gravestones (by Geometrically) so they don't get destroyed by water or explosions and work with Trinkets
body:
This mod makes small fixes to [Gravestones](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravestones) by Geometrically. Namely:

- The gravestones are no longer destroyed by water
- The gravestones are no longer explodable
- The gravestones include items from Trinkets slots

Requires the original Gravestones mod.
